meta.verified_by: Engineering — sourced from eCFR 27 CFR Parts 4, 5, 7, 16
meta.notes: This file is the single source of truth for all TTB regulatory rules used in verification. Update this file when regulations change. Commit every change to CHANGELOG.md with the CFR citation for the change.

government_warning.citation: 27 CFR Part 16 — Alcoholic Beverage Health Warning Statement
government_warning.statute: Alcoholic Beverage Labeling Act (ABLA) of 1988, 27 U.S.C. 215
government_warning.applies_to: All alcoholic beverages containing 0.5% ABV or more, domestic and imported
government_warning.exact_text: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

government_warning_label_caps_bold.requirement: The words 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' must appear in ALL CAPS and in bold type

remainder_not_bold.requirement: The remainder of the warning statement after 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' must NOT appear in bold type

contrasting_background.requirement: Must appear on a contrasting background

readily_legible.requirement: Must be readily legible under ordinary conditions

separate_and_apart.requirement: Must appear separate and apart from all other information on the label

continuous_statement.requirement: Must appear as a continuous statement — cannot be split across label panels

formatting_rules.case_requirement_note: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' is the sole field where case is explicitly mandated by regulation — 27 CFR Part 16 requires all caps and bold. This is a hard compliance check, not a fuzzy match.

distilled_spirits.citation: 27 CFR Part 5 — Labeling and Advertising of Distilled Spirits

mandatory_fields.label: Brand Name
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must appear on the label. Must not be misleading.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Class and Type Designation
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must conform to the standards of identity in 27 CFR Part 5 Subpart C.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Alcohol Content
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must be expressed as a percentage of alcohol by volume (% alc/vol). Proof is optional but if present must appear in the same field of vision as the mandatory ABV statement. Proof-only without ABV percentage is non-compliant.
mandatory_fields.match_logic: Match on numeric value. Flag format differences with a note. Flag proof-only as non-compliant.
mandatory_fields.tolerance: Per 27 CFR § 5.65, standard regulatory tolerances apply to stated vs actual ABV

mandatory_fields.label: Net Contents
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must appear on the label in metric measure.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Flag numeric differences. Flag unit differences (mL vs ml is acceptable variation, but flag for agent awareness).

mandatory_fields.label: Name and Address of Bottler
mandatory_fields.requirement: Name and address of the bottler or importer must appear on the label.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Country of Origin
mandatory_fields.requirement: Required for imported distilled spirits. Must identify the country of origin.
mandatory_fields.conditional_note: Only required when is_import = true. Skip check for domestic products.

wine.citation: 27 CFR Part 4 — Labeling and Advertising of Wine

mandatory_fields.label: Brand Name
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must appear on the brand label. Must not be misleading.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Class, Type, or Varietal Designation
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must state the class of wine per 27 CFR Part 4 Subpart C, or a permitted varietal, semigeneric geographic, or geographic distinctive designation.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Alcohol Content
mandatory_fields.requirement: For wines containing more than 14% ABV, alcohol content must be stated as a percentage of alcohol by volume. Wines 14% or under may state 'table wine' or 'light wine' in lieu of the percentage. For wines above 24% ABV, product is classified as distilled spirits.
mandatory_fields.match_logic: Match on numeric value where stated. Note 'table wine' / 'light wine' alternatives for wines ≤14% ABV.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Flag numeric differences. Note format variations.

mandatory_fields.label: Name and Address of Bottler or Packer
mandatory_fields.requirement: Name and address of the bottler, packer, or importer must appear.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

malt_beverage.citation: 27 CFR Part 7 — Labeling and Advertising of Malt Beverages

mandatory_fields.label: Brand Name
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must appear on the label. Must not be misleading.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Class and Type Designation
mandatory_fields.requirement: Must appear on the label per standards in 27 CFR Part 7 Subpart C.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

mandatory_fields.label: Alcohol Content
mandatory_fields.requirement: Alcohol content statement is required if the malt beverage label makes any alcohol content representation. If stated, must be as a percentage of alcohol by volume.
mandatory_fields.match_logic: If ABV is present in application data, verify it appears on label and matches. If not stated in application, check label for any alcohol representation.

mandatory_fields.label: Name and Address of Brewer or Packer
mandatory_fields.requirement: Name and address of the brewer, packer, or importer must appear.
mandatory_fields.fuzzy_match_policy: Match case-insensitively. Case differences alone do not constitute a flag. Flag punctuation differences, abbreviations, missing words, numeric differences, and spelling differences. TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for this field.

verification_policy.fuzzy_match_global_policy: All fuzzy matches are flagged — never auto-passed. The flag note describes the specific discrepancy. The human agent makes the final determination. This applies to all fields across all beverage types.

case_sensitivity_policy.rationale: TTB regulations do not specify case requirements for brand names, class designations, or bottler information. 27 CFR Part 16 explicitly mandates 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' in all caps and bold — this is the only field where case is a regulatory requirement.

high.label: High Confidence
high.description: Field clearly readable, unambiguous match or mismatch

low.label: Low Confidence
low.description: Field partially obscured or ambiguous — flag for review

unable.label: Unable to Verify
unable.description: Field cannot be reliably read — manual review required

status_definitions.pass: Field on label matches application value within acceptable parameters and meets TTB requirements
status_definitions.flag: Discrepancy detected between label and application, OR TTB compliance issue detected. Agent review required.
status_definitions.unable_to_verify: Image quality insufficient to reliably verify this field. This is an image problem, not a label compliance problem. Agent should request a better image.

overall_status_logic.pass: All fields pass AND all compliance checks pass AND all confidence scores are high
overall_status_logic.flag_for_review: Any field is flagged OR any compliance check fails OR any field is unable_to_verify

output_language.overall_pass: No Issues Detected — Ready for Agent Sign-Off
output_language.required_disclaimer: This result is a verification assist. Final compliance determination is the responsibility of the TTB compliance agent.
